text.first: My method is based on a deep understanding of biomechanics and somatic learning. We do not just perform exercises — we rewire habitual movement patterns.
text.second: This is work with attention, the nervous system, and the body’s natural grace. It is for those who seek lasting results rather than temporary relief.

reviews.name: Olga
reviews.text: After the classes, for the first time in many years, I stopped feeling tension in my lower back. Every movement became light and natural.

reviews.name: Elena
reviews.text: A subtle approach and real attention to detail. Maria sees the body deeply and helps you hear what it truly needs.
